summary: Added the Stage 3A project registry foundation with a generic repo adapter, project-list CLI, focused tests, and durable planning/handoff evidence.

tests_run.command: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_projects.py -q -p no:cacheprovider
tests_run.summary: 6 passed; covered registry discovery, bounded generic facts, CLI JSON and human output, missing-root errors, and path ID normalization.
Planning integrity checks passed with the Stage 3A task claimed for implementation.
Story Loop status reported queue_state=running for the claimed Stage 3A task before completion.
File justification checks passed after registering new Stage 3A files and worker-result evidence.
Public repo hygiene checks passed after replacing home-directory-like path fixtures with neutral paths.
380 passed plus Ruff, format, mypy, CLI smoke checks, file justification, public hygiene, planning integrity, skill inventory, source inventory, protected locks, and uv lock --check.

A project registry helper returns normal.evidence: discover_projects returns ProjectRegistryEntry records with stable path-derived project_id, root_path, adapter_type, trust_policy, status, and optional bounded facts; tests assert stable repeated discovery.

A generic repo adapter produces bounded.evidence: GenericRepoAdapter checks only configured root marker paths and reports source_documents, authority_markers, has_planning_database, has_tasks_json, and verification_commands; tests add unrelated files and assert they are ignored.

The project-list CLI supports JSON and h.evidence: project-list defaults to the current root or repeated explicit --root values, prints JSON/human summaries, and returns a missing-root error without creating the missing path.

Focused tests cover registry discovery,.evidence: tests/test_projects.py contains six focused tests covering all named surfaces and passed with pytest.

Planning SQLite and HANDOFF.md record th.evidence: plans/planning.sqlite3 records the Stage 3A plan/task/worker run and HANDOFF.md records the shape, implementation evidence, checks, review result, and Stage 3 residual risk.

review.summary: Fresh-thread-style local review found no actionable findings. The new surface is a thin CLI wrapper over bounded read-only project facts and does not mutate planning SQLite or target projects.

risks: Stage 3 is not fully complete: specialized adapters and task-seeding behavior remain future slices.
The generic adapter intentionally detects only bounded marker files and verification scripts; deeper project orientation belongs in future adapter-specific slices.
Live Codex Exec launch remains unavailable in this Windows shell because the resolved WindowsApps codex.exe path returns Access is denied.
follow_up_tasks: Shape and implement the next Stage 3 slice for specialized adapter contracts or adapter output seeding into planning tasks.
Keep Stage 11 MCP work behind the project registry and adapter surfaces so MCP stays a thin interface over Python core behavior.
handoff_notes: Stage 3A adds the first concrete project registry surface: project-list plus a generic repo adapter. Continue Stage 3 before Stage 11 MCP so project-list and adapter facts are mature enough for MCP exposure.
